error_debug.description:
Error Debug Information

Only available in dev mode.

error_hint.description:
Error Hint

Helps the user identify the error cause.
error_hint.example: The redirect URL is not allowed.

access_token.description: The access token issued by the authorization server.

expires_in.description:
The lifetime in seconds of the access token. For
example, the value "3600" denotes that the access token will
expire in one hour from the time the response was generated.

id_token.description: To retrieve a refresh token request the id_token scope.

refresh_token.description:
The refresh token, which can be used to obtain new
access tokens. To retrieve it add the scope "offline" to your access token request.

scope.description: The scope of the access token

token_type.description: The type of the token issued

allOf.description: Specifies the type of invoice service to use; only applicable when invoice_handling is AUTOMATIC_WITH_INVOICE_SERVICE. If invoice_handling is MANUAL or AUTOMATIC, this field should be omitted.

anchor_day.description: The day of the month to anchor invoice dates to

invoice_date.description: The date that appears on the invoice

last_date.description: The last date for this recurring billing

processing_date.description: The date when the invoice should be processed

recurring_ids.description: List of recurring IDs to create invoices for. When using SYNC processing mode, a maximum of 100 IDs is allowed. For larger batches, use ASYNC processing mode.

anchor_day.description: The day of the month to anchor period dates to

amount.description: The amount/interval for the recurring billing cycle

unit.description: The unit of time for the recurring billing cycle

anchor_day.description: The day of the month to anchor invoice dates to

invoice_date.description: The date that appears on the invoice

last_date.description: The last date for this recurring billing

processing_date.description: The date when the invoice should be processed

RecurringAPIInvoiceServiceType.title: RecurringAPIInvoiceServiceType
RecurringAPIInvoiceServiceType.description:
Indicates the type of invoice service used for automatic invoice handling:
- WITH_REMINDERS: Full invoice service, including reminders.
- WITHOUT_REMINDERS: Light invoice service, only invoice creation and delivery without automatic reminders.

value.description: Value used by add, replace, and remove operations.

anchor_day.description: The day of the month to anchor period dates to

template.description: if no value provided its fetched from settings

amount.description: The amount/interval for the recurring billing cycle

unit.description: The unit of time for the recurring billing cycle

RecurringAPIRecurringSortBy.title: RecurringAPIRecurringSortBy
RecurringAPIRecurringSortBy.description:
Available fields to sort recurring contracts by:
- serialNumber: Sort by recurring serial number
- customerId: Sort by customer ID
- customerName: Sort by customer name
- nextInvoiceDate: Sort by next invoice date
- invoiceDate: Sort by invoice date

RecurringAPISortOrder.title: RecurringAPISortOrder
RecurringAPISortOrder.description:
Sort order direction:
- ASC: Ascending order (A-Z, 0-9, earliest to latest)
- DESC: Descending order (Z-A, 9-0, latest to earliest)

RecurringAPITaxReductionArticleType.title: RecurringAPITaxReductionArticleType
RecurringAPITaxReductionArticleType.description:
Types of tax reduction articles:
- NOT_HOUSEWORK: No tax reduction (0%)
- RUT category (50%): CLEANING, TEXTILE_CLOTHING, SNOWPLOWING, GARDENING, BABYSITTING, OTHER_CARE, MOVING_SERVICES, IT_SERVICES, MAJOR_APPLIANCE_REPAIR, FURNISHING, HOME_MAINTENANCE, TRANSPORTATION_SERVICES, WASHING_AND_CARE_OF_CLOTHING
- ROT category (30%): CONSTRUCTION, ELECTRICITY, GLASS_METAL_WORK, GROUND_DRAINAGE_WORK, MASONRY, PAINTING_WALLPAPERING, HVAC
- GREEN category: SOLAR_CELLS (20%), STORAGE_SELF_PRODUCED_ELECTRICITY (50%), CHARGING_STATION_ELECTRIC_VEHICLE (50%)
- OTHER_COSTS: Other costs (0%) for tax reduction

RecurringAPITaxReductionCostType.title: RecurringAPITaxReductionCostType
RecurringAPITaxReductionCostType.description: Indicates if the row represents material costs (MATERIAL) or labor costs (LABOR) for tax reduction calculations

RecurringAPIVatOption.title: RecurringAPIVatOption
RecurringAPIVatOption.description: Indicates if the prices are shown including VAT (INCLUSIVE) or excluding VAT (EXCLUSIVE)
